summary.quantification_method: normalized ratios of phosphorylated over non-phosphorylated peptides

matched_class_path: gene modification or gain of function
primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: Cdc37 and Hsp90 point mutants were generated using the QuikChange II XL Site-Directed Mutagenesis Kit
the non-phosphorylatable Y4F/Y298F double mutant (Cdc37FF) or the single non-phosphorylatable mutant Y298F (Cdc37F) were utilized to reconstitute ternary complexes
ternary complexes of the double-phosphomimetic mutant Cdc37EE

primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using a compound that activates a receptor or pathway.
evidence: the reactions were initiated by the addition of phosphatase inhibitor cocktail, 0.91 μg of recombinant full-length Yes (EMD), and ATP (0.5 mM final concentration)

replicate_hints: quantifying phosphorylation in a set of two different reactions

evidence: when the non-phosphorylatable Y4F/Y298F double mutant (Cdc37FF) or the single non-phosphorylatable mutant Y298F (Cdc37F) were utilized to reconstitute ternary complexes, Hsp90Y197 phosphorylation dropped by one order of magnitude
A reference spectrum of unmodified Cdc37 was acquired at the same temperature and the same buffer.

quantification_strategy: normalized ratios of phosphorylated over non-phosphorylated peptides

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data acquired via Top 10 Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) on a Q Exactive Plus. Quantification is described as normalized ratios of phosphorylated over non-phosphorylated peptides, which is a label-free approach.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment specifically targets phosphorylation sites on Hsp90 and Cdc37 using in-gel digestion of specific protein bands, effectively enriching for these analytes.
